question_text: Which of the following is an example of friction being useful?

options.label: A
options.text: Friction making it difficult to slide a box across the floor

options.label: B
options.text: Friction helping shoes grip the ground so we don't slip

options.label: C
options.text: Friction slowing down a bicycle when we want to go faster

options.label: D
options.text: Friction causing wear on car tyres

explanation: Friction between shoes and the ground is useful because it prevents us from slipping and allows us to walk safely. The other examples show friction as a nuisance or something we want to reduce.
